predictedObservableEvidence: Multiple plausible file/fold interpretations produce different metrics or block a strong protocol-first claim.
predictedFalsifier: Source documentation defines one clear replayable protocol and variants converge.
expectedMetricDeltaRange: variant-dependent; ambiguity more important than point estimate
expectedControlOutcome: decision should be caveated or rejected if ambiguity remains
plannedExecutionTest: load xaa-xai partitions, compare file-holdout, random, and fold-based interpretations
noEditRule: Frozen before Batch 33 execution; later batches may compare observations but must not rewrite this card.
